creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The problem is not yet understood.  A large number of PRs are indeed going 
in and being properly accepted, acknowledged, shown on the website, and also 
propogated via CVS.  I have also been checking the spam-filter-queue and 
no valid PRs have been found there for the last 2 days.  (From November 
17 to ~27th, everything but the 'accepted' part had been broken.  That 
underlying issue is now believed to be fixed.) 

While we try to figure out what's going on, we ask for patience from our 
users.  Thanks.
